name: Wedding Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Candied cherries, cut in half
1/2 pound Candied orange and lemon peel, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and spices together three times.
2. Cream shortening and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Mix in fruit, nuts, honey, molasses, and cider.
5. Gradually add sifted flour mixture, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
6. Pour batter into greased cake pans lined with heavy paper and lightly greased.
7. For large loaves (8x4x3 inch pans), bake at 250 degrees for about 4 hours.
8. For small loaves (6x3x2-1/2 inch pans), bake at 250 degrees for 2 1/2 to 3 hours.
9. For an 8-1/2 inch tube pan, bake at 250 degrees for 4 to 5 hours.
10. Test with a toothpick before removing from the oven.
11. Makes 10 pounds of cake.
12. Spread ornamental icing on top and sides of cake and decorate with simple borders and rosettes of icing.
